title: Standardize CLI JSON output contracts
description:
Standardize pre-v1.0 JSON response shapes across CLI commands so automation and MCP consumers receive predictable structures.

## Background

The existing JSON standardization plan identifies inconsistent list, query, and search response shapes. The project owner confirmed that breaking JSON changes are acceptable before v1.0, so this task should clean up contracts rather than preserve legacy quirks.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] List-style JSON responses use named collections plus `count` consistently.
- [ ] Single-item JSON responses and summary responses follow documented response patterns.
- [ ] Search and label/gate/query outputs are updated according to the JSON standardization plan.
- [ ] Command schema generation and MCP-facing schemas reflect the standardized outputs.
- [ ] Tests are updated or added for every changed JSON contract.
